steps.title: Make matching coefficients
steps.content:
Rewrite the first equation so the $x$-terms line up with the second equation:
$$7y=-6x+2170$$
$$6x+7y=2170$$
The second equation simplifies to
$$6x-7y=350$$

steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
Adding the equations eliminates $y$:
$$6x+7y=2170$$
$$6x-7y=350$$
$$12x=2520$$
$$x=210$$
Then substitute into $6x+7y=2170$:
$$6(210)+7y=2170$$
$$y=130$$

steps.title: Find the requested sum
steps.content:
Graphing the two equations gives the same intersection, $(210{,}130)$. The question asks for the sum of the coordinates, so add them:
$$210+130=340$$
The answer is 340.
